decisions.question: Chart 与 Ink 如何共存？
decisions.chosen: unmount Ink → spawnSync trader-chart inherit stdio → relaunch Ink
decisions.rationale: ratatui 与 Ink 不能同屏；同终端避免 longbridge 式新窗口割裂

decisions.question: Dashboard 预览？
decisions.rationale: at-a-glance 不依赖 Rust 构建

decisions.question: 数据源？
decisions.rationale: OHLCV 已存在，与 chartIntervals 对齐
